description: Self-cancelling reminder to structure substantial deliverables (reports, reviews, summaries, comparisons, analyses) for human scanning. Pure data, keyword match on non-slash prompts, following the workflow rule's 'if X... if not, ignore' style.

text: If the response will be a substantial deliverable (report, review, summary, comparison, analysis): make it human-parsable - lead with the conclusion, prefer short sections, tables, and bullets over walls of prose, define jargon on first use, and keep it terse.
If this is a quick back-and-forth, ignore this guidance.
